name: here2help-etl-lambda
description: AWS Lambda ETL for exporting here2help Postgres data to Google Sheets.

scripts.setup:env: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) { console.log('.env already exists; leaving it unchanged.'); } else { fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env'); console.log('Created .env from .env.example. Fill in the Google credentials.'); }"
scripts.invoke:local: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env')) { console.error('Missing .env. Run npm run setup:env, then fill in Google credentials.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm run build && node --env-file=.env -e "require('./dist/index.js').handler().then((result) => console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../lambda.zip index.js
